author: Redjumpman (original concept)
hbicofbiology (recreation)
install_msg:
Casino has been installed! Use `[p]casino info` to see available games and settings.
Original concept by Redjumpman.
name: Casino
short: A casino cog with multiple games using Red's economy.
description: Play casino games like Blackjack, Coin Flip, Cups, Dice, Hi-Lo, War, Craps, All-In, and Double or Nothing. Features configurable settings, cooldowns, stats tracking, and Discord embed outputs. Inspired by Redjumpman's original Casino cog.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores user IDs, game statistics (wins, losses, total wagered/won), and cooldown timestamps.
